import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { pondService, environmentLogService, sensorService, notificationService } from '../../services/api' import DashboardCard, { evaluateMetric } from '../../components/DashboardCard' import '../../styles/dashboard.css' import '../../styles/dashboard-cards.css' import '../../styles/technician/technician-layout.css' import '../../styles/technician/technician-dashboard.css' export const TechnicianDashboard = () => { const [monitoredPonds, setMonitoredPonds] = useState([]) const [recentEnvironmentLogs, setRecentEnvironmentLogs] = useState([]) const [activeSensors, setActiveSensors] = useState([]) const [sensors, setSensors] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [error, setError] = useState(null) const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { fetchData() }, []) const fetchData = async () => { try { setLoading(true) const [pondsRes, sensorsRes, notificationsRes] = await Promise.all([ pondService.getAllPonds(), sensorService.getAllSensors(), notificationService.getNotifications(), ]) const ponds = pondsRes?.data?.data || [] const allSensors = sensorsRes?.data?.data || [] const notifs = notificationsRes?.data?.data || [] setMonitoredPonds(ponds) setSensors(allSensors) setActiveSensors(allSensors.filter((s) => String(s.status || '').toUpperCase().includes('ACTIVE')).length) setNotifications(notifs) } catch (err) { setError('Lỗi tải dữ liệu') console.error(err) } finally { setLoading(false) } } // Calculate monitoring statistics const monitoringStats = { totalPonds: monitoredPonds.length, activeSensors: activeSensors || 0, recentLogs: recentEnvironmentLogs.length, } if (loading) { return (
); } return (

{(() => { const times = sensors.map(s => s.last_reading_time || s.updated_at || s.updatedAt).filter(Boolean) if (!times.length) return '-' const latest = new Date(Math.max(...times.map(t => new Date(t).getTime()))) return latest.toLocaleString('vi-VN', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }) })()}

(found.current_value ?? '-') : '-' } return (

) })}

'pH' : type === 'temperature' ? 'Temp' : type === 'dissolved oxygen' ? 'DO' : type === 'salinity' ? 'Salinity' : 'Turbidity' const val = s?.current_value ?? '-' return (
{label} {s ? Live updating : null}
{val === '-' ? '-' : Number(val).toFixed(1)}{type === 'ph' ? '' : type === 'temperature' ? '°C' : type === 'dissolved oxygen' ? ' mg/L' : type === 'salinity' ? ' ppt' : ' NTU'}
) })}

📌 Tính năng chính

✨ Quyền hạn

  • ✅ Xem danh sách tất cả ao trong hệ thống
  • ✅ Nhập chỉ số môi trường thủ công
  • ✅ Xem dữ liệu cảm biến realtime
